title: TIM - ArcSight Add IP Indicators
content:
This playbook receives indicators from its parent playbook and provides the indicators as inputs for the sub-playbooks that push the indicators to SIEM.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (ArcSightESM, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — ArcSightBlackListIPActiveListID: ID of the block list IP Active List resource as appears in ArcSight.; ArcsightBlackListIPValueFieldName: The name of the block list Active List field to insert the IP value to.; ArcSightWhiteListIPActiveListID: ID of the allow list IP Active List resource as appears in ArcSight.; ArcsightWhiteListIPValueFieldName: The name of the allow list Active List field to insert the IP value to.; ArcSightWatchListIPActiveListID: ID of the watch list IP Active List resource as appears in ArcSight.; ArcsightWatchListIPValueFieldName: The name of the watch list Active List field to insert the IP value to..

Integrations/scripts used: ArcSight ESM v2.
